# Identify policy violations generated by Communication Compliance


## Links

- [Microsoft Learn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/communication-compliance)


## Notes

- Checks for inappropiate text in 
  - Teams chats
  - Emails
  - Copilot chats
  - Viva engage

- Built in and custom policies
- Can configure alerts
  - Investigate alert
  - Escalate alerts
